firstLaunchSetupDefaultTitle.description: Setup option title for starting with default tabs

firstLaunchSetupDefaultDescription.message: Start with the standard set of tabs
firstLaunchSetupDefaultDescription.description: Setup option description for starting with default tabs

firstLaunchSetupEmptyTitle.description: Setup option title for starting with an empty profile

firstLaunchSetupEmptyDescription.message: Begin with an empty profile and add tabs manually
firstLaunchSetupEmptyDescription.description: Setup option description for starting with an empty profile

firstLaunchSetupImportTitle.description: Setup option title for importing an existing configuration

firstLaunchSetupImportDescription.message: Import an SF Tabs configuration file
firstLaunchSetupImportDescription.description: Setup option description for importing an existing configuration

firstLaunchEnableProfilesDescription.message: Profiles let you manage different tab configurations

firstLaunchGuideButton.description: Button that opens the user guide

firstLaunchGetStartedButton.description: Primary button to complete first-launch setup

firstLaunchSyncFoundTitle.description: Heading shown when existing sync data is detected on a new device

firstLaunchSyncFoundMessage.message: We found existing SF Tabs data in your browser sync$PROFILES$.
firstLaunchSyncFoundMessage.description: Message shown when sync data is detected. $PROFILES$ is replaced with ' (X profiles with tabs)' when profiles exist, or omitted.

firstLaunchSyncFoundQuestion.message: Would you like to use it or start fresh?
firstLaunchSyncFoundQuestion.description: Question shown below the sync data detected message

firstLaunchUseSyncedButton.description: Button to use the existing synced configuration

firstLaunchStartFreshButton.description: Button to discard synced data and run the normal setup wizard

firstLaunchErrorLoadingSync.description: Error shown when loading synced configuration fails

firstLaunchErrorClearingSync.description: Error shown when clearing sync data before starting fresh fails

firstLaunchErrorSetup.description: Error shown when the Get Started initialization fails
